primary_text:
I signed up for Best for Pet on a Tuesday. By Wednesday I had booked my dog's overdue vaccination and a consult I had been putting off. Paid nothing for either.

That is what $50 a month gets you. Unlimited vet consults. All vaccinations and boosters. $250 off dental. Annual blood and urine tests. 24/7 VetChat.

One fee. Everything routine. Sorted.

Not insurance. No claims, no excess.

No joining fee. No waiting period. Cancel anytime.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: Signed up Tuesday. Vet visit Wednesday. $0.
description: $50/month. One fee. Unlimited consults, vaccinations, $250 off dental.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
